summary: Frontend adds Buy Rental dialog, Owner Messages + My Orders pages, status badges, routing/nav updates, and end-to-end manual test doc. However, the diff evidence for backend Order model/APIs/authorization is missing from the provided backend/main.mo excerpt; instead, unrelated User Profile functionality appears to have been added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend Order record with exactly these fields: rental (Rental reference), buyer (Principal), buyerPhone, buyerEmail, buyerAddress, status (Text), createdAt (timestamp).
missing_requirements.reason: In the shown backend/main.mo excerpt, only Rental and UserProfile types/functions are visible; no Order type/record definition is evidenced.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated excerpt shows UserProfile + Rental system; no Order type visible)

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend persistence for Orders with a stable unique Order ID (not derived from rental title) and guarantee create-order creates exactly one new record; accept-order must not create a new Order.
missing_requirements.reason: No order storage, unique ID generation, or accept-order logic is evidenced in the backend excerpt.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no Order map/storage, ID counter, or accept logic visible)

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend API createOrder: authenticated only; sets rental, buyer=caller, buyerPhone/email/address, status="Pending", createdAt=now; persists and returns Order/ID.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend calls actor.createOrder(...), but the backend excerpt does not show any createOrder method or server-side status/createdAt enforcement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend API getOwnerOrders constrained to rentals where rental.createdBy == caller; returns rental title + buyer details + status.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend calls actor.getOwnerOrders(), but the backend excerpt contains no getOwnerOrders implementation or authorization filtering evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend API getBuyerOrders constrained to buyer == caller; returns rental image/title/price and status.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend calls actor.getBuyerOrders(), but the backend excerpt contains no getBuyerOrders implementation or evidence of returning rental image/title/price alongside order status.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend acceptOrder updates existing Order status to "Accepted" only; no new Order created; only rental owner can accept.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend calls actor.acceptOrder(orderId), but the backend excerpt shows no acceptOrder implementation or owner-only authorization check for order acceptance.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend authorization/privacy: view allowed only if buyer==caller OR rental.createdBy==caller; create authenticated only; edit/delete only rental owner.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend excerpt does not show any order-related authorization checks for viewing/listing/creating/updating/deleting orders.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; order auth rules not visible)

hallucinated_features.description: User Profile system (types and APIs) and frontend hook to fetch user profiles/buyer names.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask for adding a user profile feature; it allows buyer name to be the principal string if no profile exists. The diff introduces new profile storage and APIs plus a hook to fetch them.
